item.title: The Attack Surface in Your Pocket芒聙聰and How Scattered Spider Socially Engineers Their Way Inside
item.description: Close the mobile security gap in financial services with actionable steps to protect personal devices from threats like Scattered Spider.

item.title: Oblivion RAT - An Android Spyware Platform With a Built-In APK Factory
item.description: Technical analysis of Oblivion RAT Android malware: $300/month MaaS platform with APK builder, AccessibilityService hijacking, and fake ZIP encryption.

item.title: With iOS 26.2 Release, Apple Reverses Course on Shutdown.log
item.description: iOS 26's shutdown.log changes erased traces of Pegasus and Predator spyware, but Apple reverted the fix in 26.2.

item.title: Breaking Down ZeroDayRAT - New Spyware Targeting Android and iOS
item.description: ZeroDayRAT is a commercial mobile spyware platform sold via Telegram that gives attackers full remote access to Android and iOS devices

item.title: iVerify Extends Cloudflare Integrations With WARP
item.description: We're bringing Cloudflare Zero Trust (WARP) to mobile devices, delivering real-time posture signals directly into Cloudflare access policies.

item.title: Mobile Is the New Initial Access Vector for Financial Institutions
item.description: As banks harden endpoints, attackers are shifting to mobile. Real mobile spyware, zero-click attacks, why MDM fails, and why BYOD phones are prime targets.

item.title: Meet Cellik - A New Android RAT With Play Store Integration
item.description: Discover how Cellik Android RAT enables full device surveillance with live screen access, keylogging, app injection, and Play Store APK wrapping.

item.title: Intellexa芒聙聶s Predator Exploit Chain: New Details Emerge After Google Publishes Samples
item.description: Google芒聙聶s new research reveals how Intellexa芒聙聶s Predator spyware exploits zero-days, abuses iOS trust mechanisms, and continues evolving despite sanctions

item.title: Spyware Doesn芒聙聶t Take Holidays.
item.description: This year, we're giving the gift of mobile security. From Black Friday through December 31, 2025 iVerify Basic is completely free.

item.title: iVerify Enterprise Is Now Integrated with Microsoft Intune
item.description: iVerify芒聙聶s Microsoft Intune integration brings risk-based mobile security, stronger BYOD protection, automated policies, and seamless threat remediation.

item.title: Key IOCs for Pegasus and Predator Spyware Cleaned With iOS 26 Update
item.description: iOS 26 changes how shutdown logs are handled, erasing key evidence of Pegasus and Predator spyware, creating new challenges for forensic investigators

item.title: Android Bug Reports: An Underrated but Complex Goldmine for Mobile Security Investigations
item.description: Dive into what bug reports actually contain, the kinds of security benefits they offer, and the challenges of traditional analysis

item.title: HyperRat 芒聙聯 A New Android RAT Sold On Cybercrime Networks
item.description: Discover HyperRat, an Android remote access tool being sold on cybercrime forums. Learn about its features, how it operates, and its impact on cybersecurity.茂禄驴

item.title: How AI Regulation Can Help Europe Win the AI Race
item.description: Strategic AI regulation can help Europe navigate job displacement and technological leadership, turning a critical challenge into a competitive advantage.

item.title: Renting Android Malware Is Getting Easier and Cheaper
item.description: Android malware-as-a-service platforms like PhantomOS and Nebula offer powerful malware kits and scalable distribution tools, no technical skills required.

item.title: How Attackers Run Smishing Campaigns (And Why They Work)
item.description: Smishing is surging. We break down how cybercriminals source phone numbers, launch spoofed SMS campaigns, and trick victims into handing over credentials
